02084|       // are estimated before deposit steps — parallel estimation of deposits fails because
02085|       // the simulated allowance is still 0 when the approve hasn't been sent yet.
02086|       const gasLimits: (bigint | undefined)[] = []
02087|       for (const step of txSteps) {
02088|         try {
02089|           const estimated = await publicClient.estimateGas({
02090|             account: address as `0x${string}`,
02091|             to: step.to,
02092|             data: step.data,
02093|             value: step.value,
02094|           })
02095|           const withBuffer = (estimated * 130n) / 100n
02096|           console.log(`Gas estimated for ${step.stepId}: ${estimated} → ${withBuffer} (with buffer)`)
02097|           gasLimits.push(withBuffer)
02098|         } catch (e) {
02099|           const fallback = GAS_FALLBACK[step.stepId]
02100|           console.warn(`Gas estimation failed for ${step.stepId}, using fallback ${fallback}:`, e)
02101|           gasLimits.push(fallback)
02102|         }
02103|       }
02104| 
02105|       toast.info(`Executing ${txSteps.length} step(s)...`)
02106| 
02107|       let confirmedCount = 0
02108|       const failedTxs: number[] = []
02109| 
02110|       for (let i = 0; i < txSteps.length; i++) {
02111|         const step = txSteps[i]
02112|         console.log(`Step ${i + 1}/${txSteps.length}: ${step.stepId}`, {
02113|           to: step.to,
02114|           value: step.value.toString(),
02115|           gas: gasLimits[i]?.toString(),
02116|         })
02117|         try {
02118|           const hash = await sendTx(wagmiConfig, {
02119|             to: step.to,
02120|             data: step.data,
02121|             value: step.value,
02122|             gas: gasLimits[i],
02123|             // Explicitly omit maxFeePerGas / maxPriorityFeePerGas so the wallet
02124|             // uses current network prices instead of the stale values from the quote
02125|           })
02126|           console.log(`Step ${i + 1} (${step.stepId}) submitted:`, hash)
02127|           toast.info(`${step.stepLabel} ${i + 1}/${txSteps.length} submitted...`)
02128| 
02129|           // Wait for on-chain confirmation
02130|           await waitForTransactionReceipt(wagmiConfig, { hash })
02131|           confirmedCount++
02132|           console.log(`Step ${i + 1} (${step.stepId}) confirmed`)
